revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 1024x512 pixel-art sprite sheet on a pure solid #FF00FF chroma-key background. Sheet layout is 4 columns x 2 rows, 8 equal cells of 256x256 px. Invisible cell boundaries only: do not draw grid lines, separator lines, borders, numbers, labels, text, logos, UI, or watermark.

Use the attached reference image as the exact character identity and style reference. Re-pose the same hero Mito from the reference, preserving the same head size, head-to-body ratio, slim-but-sturdy body width, total height, limb thickness, palette, dark one-pixel outline, pixel density, and high-resolution 16-bit-plus pixel-art rendering. Treat this as re-posing the existing character, not redesigning.

Character: androgynous 15-year-old bright mythical-Japan action RPG traveler, top-down 3/4 view but full clean side profile facing LEFT. Ink-black short hair tied into a tiny low ponytail at the nape, vermilion braided-cord hair ornament, calm amber eye visible in profile. White tube-sleeved top, short indigo-blue haori with small vermilion braided-cord knots on sleeves and hem, loose young-leaf-green hakama trousers tucked into dark leggings with red cord ties, light travel sandals, vermilion braided cord belt-sash with small tassel, necklace with three pale-green magatama beads. At the visible left hip is a sheathed short ritual sword in a WHITE scabbard wrapped with thin sacred rope and tiny white paper streamers; it reads as a festival ritual implement, not a samurai katana. No samurai armor, no kabuto, no ninja outfit, no two-sword daisho, no gun, no modern objects, no companion creature.

Motion: 8-frame subtle idle breathing loop for ONE direction only, facing LEFT in every frame. Top row left-to-right = frames 1-4; bottom row left-to-right = frames 5-8. Frame 1 neutral relaxed side-profile stance. Frame 2 slow inhale, chest rises 1-2 pixels. Frame 3 inhale peak. Frame 4 held breath. Frame 5 exhale begins. Frame 6 lowest relaxed point 1-2 pixels lower while feet stay planted on the same ground line. Frame 7 returns toward neutral with tiny ponytail and cord sway. Frame 8 back to neutral, seamless loop. Silhouette changes are very small and smooth; haori hem and paper streamers sway subtly.

Strict containment: exactly one character per cell, same scale and same standing height across all upright frames, centered with clear solid #FF00FF margin on all four sides. Feet close together at shoulder width, legs nearly vertical, natural relaxed profile, feet never move and stay on the same ground line in every cell. No body part, sword piece, hair ornament, streamer, effect, dust, stray pixel island, detached fragment, sliver, residue, or artifact may cross a cell border or float detached anywhere on the sheet.

Rendering: crisp low-resolution pixels with no antialiasing blur, consistent cheerful bright palette, fine readable pixel clusters, dark one-pixel outline where useful, top-left light source, solid #FF00FF filling all empty space.
